name: Target Toy Shopping Cart
description: Your little one will absolutely love pretend shopping time with their very own Tiny Target Shopping Cart. Modeled after the actual Target Shopping Cart found in stores, this kid-sized 12-piece pretend grocery set features a child seat for baby doll, Target branded barista coffee cup & sleeve, Good & Gather™, Favorite Day™ market items, fruit & more such food toys! Durable & super easy to wipe clean! Doll not included.
